  • Feed post

    Angelo AmentaAngelo Amenta • 1st • 1st Machine Learning, Data Science & Data Engineering Recruiter | Organizer of the AI in Action PodcastMachine Learning, Data Science & Data Engineering Recruiter | Organizer of the AI in Action Podcast
    5h • 5h •
    Check out a few of my priority Machine Learning job openings as we close out February:

    ⭐ Senior Machine Learning Engineer (RAG/LLM), FinTech, you will build RAG models with vector databases for conversational AI. We are looking for candidates with experience fine-tuning & deploying LLM models.
    - Location: Hybrid in New York, SF, Colorado, or North Carolina.

    ⭐ AI/ML Researcher (All seniorities), Multi-Strat Fund, you are someone who is looking to apply quantitative methods and ML to steer multi-asset trading strategies.
    - This is an opportunity for someone from a non-traditional finance background to break into the lucrative world of quantitative trading as pure tech AI/ML backgrounds are valued.
    - For candidates in finance, this is a chance to join a buy-side group that leverages machine learning as their north star and it is fundamental to what they do.
    - Location: Hybrid in New York/Connecticut

    ⭐ Senior or Lead Software Engineer, AI/ML Platform & Infra, FinTech, we are looking for a strong engineer to join a leading NYC-based fintech who closed ~$260M in funding in 2023.
    - We are looking for an engineer who can work end-to-end on the development of a new enterprise LLM product. Responsibilities include core platform/infra work, maximizing throughput while reducing latency, data pipelining/ingesting, MLOPs/DevOps, deploying the latest AI/ML models into production, building the feature store, etc.
    - Location: Hybrid in New York

    Interested in any of the above? Message me here or at angelo@alldus.com for more information.

    All candidates must have authorization to work in the U.S.

    #Hiring #Machinelearing #artificialintelligence #dataengineering #jobs #mlops #mljobs #fintech #fintechjobs #data

    #hiring urgently for Sr. Devops Architect (MLOPS) consultant. Please share profiles at simon.clarks@commfinitytech.com

    Role : Sr. Devops Architect (MLOPS)
    Location : Pittsburgh, PA / Dallas, TX
    C2C will do fine
    Exp : 12 yrs and above
     
    Job Summary:

    DevOps resource having experience with deployment on AWS services along with OpenShift and other open-source frameworks. This position can be from a non-data science background. We are looking for an individual to build an automated DevOps pipeline to support our Machine Learning organization build and deploy to multiple targets and Develop new strategy for Fraud and AML.

    Xiaodong Liang
    Xiaodong LiangXiaodong Liang • 3rd+ • 3rd+ Professor and Canada Research Chair at University of SaskatchewanProfessor and Canada Research Chair at University of Saskatchewan
    10h • 10h •
    We are hiring PhD students in power systems

    Professor Xiaodong Liang's research group at the University of Saskatchewan, Canada, is hiring PhD students in power systems starting in Sept. 2024. Suitable candidates should have a Master's degree in electrical engineering with a focus on power systems. The preference will be given to the candidates with the excellent background in power distribution systems, renewable energy, control, optimization, and machine learning. If you are interested, please send an e-mail to xil659@mail.usask.ca.

    Opening for Scrum Master
    Location- Bahrain


    Experience Required:
    8+ years’ experience in Agile Project Management with experience preferably in fintech, Technology or financial services
    Strong ability to interact with stakeholders to understand and interpret and prioritize their needs

    Aarti KumariAarti Kumari • 3rd+ • 3rd+ Senior Technical RecruiterSenior Technical Recruiter
    8h • 8h •

    Hello Folk (Bench sales Recruiter),
    I have one open position
    Very Urgent Role for C2C
    I am hiring please connect and share resume to my email: arti.kumari@diverselynx.com.

    Title: Data Scientist GenAI 
    Location: Remote
    job Type: C2C

    Responsibilities:
    Build and maintain scalable infrastructure for machine learning model & pipeline deployment, including containerization & orchestration.
    Develop and maintain scalable & secure REST APIs for serving multiple machine learning models to various users.
    Collaborate with data scientists and software engineers to ensure seamless integration of ML models into our systems.
    Design and optimize data pipelines, data storage, and data processing systems to support the training and inference processes of machine learning models.
    Build and maintain data and model dashboards to monitor model performance and health in production environments.
    Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify and address data quality, data governance, and security considerations in the context of ML operations
    #dataanalytics #datascientistjobs #genai #ml #machinelearning

    Sweedal FernandesSweedal Fernandes • 3rd+ • 3rd+ HR Executive - GRG Health| MBA in HR & MarketingHR Executive - GRG Health| MBA in HR & Marketing
    19h • 19h •
    We are hiring for Market Research Analyst for Pune Location.
    Interested candidates can share their Cv to sweedal.fernandes@grgonline.com

    About GRG Health: GRG Health (A Growman Group Company) is an awarded, global healthcare knowledge services and market research company headquartered in Pune (India) with offices in Gurgaon, Bangalore, Boston (USA) and Singapore. GRG Health is working on developing machine learning models that can be implemented in traditional insights gathering and analytics approach. Our dedicated team of data scientists are working with a few clients on pilot run of our AI engine.

    Experience: Fresher
    Qualifications: • MBA/BTech (Biotech, Microbiology and any life science or healthcare stream) and above graduates (InHealthcare)

    Roles & Responsibilities: • You will be responsible for conducting online market/business.
    • Support in research and analysis of market topics.
    • Generate market reports/information database.
    • Create lead across EU and APAC countries and recruit them for interviews via email and phone.
    • Assisting moderate qualitative and quantitative interviews with professionals across the globe via phone.
    • Candidate is expected to conduct in-depth interviews (both face-to-face and telephonic) of target respondents.
    • Candidate is expected to interpret the data and liaise with the team to generate insights and develop reports.

    Skill set required: • Strong communication and presentation skills
    • Ability to interpret data and do multitask
    • Knowledge of Market Research • Strong analytical and critical skills

    Job type: Full Time (Work from Office)
    Location: Pune
    Probation – 3 Months
    Bond – 1 Year

    #pharmacyjobs #biotechjobs #microbiology #pharmaceuticalindustry #punehiring #pharma #lifesciencesjobs #healthcarejobs

    Colin Cooper IncColin Cooper Inc 414 followers414 followers
    16h • 16h •
    Do you agree, that AI, is a game-changer for business agility? Here is what I prepared in my new article.

    Understanding AI:
     - Rapid data processing, automating business models.

    Building Flexibility:
     - Integrating AI for quick adaptation.
     - Examples: chatbots, machine learning.

    Cultivating Agile Mindset:
     - Fostering a culture of experimentation.

    Leveraging AI for Customers:
     - Enhancing insights, loyalty through personalization.

    Data-Driven Decisions:
     - AI tools for informed decisions.

    Investing in AI Skills:
     - Hiring specialists, upskilling for effective implementation.

    Continuous Innovation:
     - Core for success in the AI era.

    Real-World Examples:
     - Amazon, Walmart showcase AI success.

    AI Benefits and Challenges:
     - Efficiency, experiences, competitive advantage.
     - Addressing challenges ethically.

    https://lnkd.in/eAgkmpx3
    Using AI to Drive Business Agility: How to Build a Flexible and Resilient Organisation in the Age of AI
    Colin Cooper on LinkedIn • 6 min read

    We are hiring for Sr. Research Analyst / Asst. Team Lead
    Interested Candidates share your CV to shruti.phatale@martlenz.com

    About GRG Health:
    GRG Health (A Growman Group Company) is an awarded, global healthcare knowledge services and market research company head quartered in Pune (India) with offices in Gurgaon, Bangalore,Boston (USA) and Singapore.
    GRG Health is working on developing machine learning models that can be implemented in traditional insights gathering and analytics approach. Our dedicated teams of data scientists are working with a few clients on pilot run of our AI engine.

    Job Specification:
    • Qualifications: Bachelor/master’s degree in Life Science or MBA(Healthcare)
    • Experience: 2 to 5 years
    • Probation: 3 Months
    • Bond: 1 Year

    Roles & Responsibilities:
    • Train new joinees for qualitative and quantitative studies
    • Moderate qualitative and quantitative interviews with professionals across the globe via phone.
    • Adhere to targets shared.
    • Interpret data and formulate reports.
    • Strong written and oral communication skills
    • Responsible for quality check of client deliverables
    • Needs to communicate with their team leader and EM Team on regular basis to discuss the progress on the projects.
    • Needs to establish strong working relationships with internal stakeholders to enhance quality and identify gaps and opportunities for improvement.

    Skill set required:
    • Strong written & oral communication skills
    • Ability to interpret data and multitask.
    • Knowledge of Market Research methodologies (secondary & primary)
    • Strong analytical & critical thinking skills
    • Ability to individually manage a small group of people.
    • Eye for detail (sync & logic)

Csaba Demeter

3:06 AM

Csaba: Hi Hemanth, how often do recruiters reach out when you're not job hunting? How much time do you waste every year with irrelevant job requests? Our vision is a world where recruiters ONLY reach out like this: - ''Hey Hemanth, we have a job opportunity with a 95% match with your ReadyFly profile. Let's connect, etc'' -- What do you think, Hemanth? Open to joining our user advisory board?

3rd+","attributesV2":[],"accessibilityTextAttributesV2":[],"accessibilityText":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.6a224ca38654a84754a1eb3e97c0f846"],"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.text.TextViewModel"},"trackingId":"n/UUtHbHQF+UWJDMcEvKrw==","summary":{"textDirection":"USER_LOCALE","text":"We are hiring for Sr. Research Analyst / Asst. Team Lead\nInterested Candidates share your CV to shruti.phatale@martlenz.com\n\nAbout GRG Health:\nGRG Health (A Growman Group Company) is an awarded, global healthcare knowledge services and market research company head quartered in Pune (India) with offices in Gurgaon, Bangalore,Boston (USA) and Singapore.\nGRG Health is working on developing machine learning models that can be implemented in traditional insights gathering and analytics approach. Our dedicated teams of data scientists are working with a few clients on pilot run of our AI engine.\n\nJob Specification:\n• Qualifications: Bachelor/master’s degree in Life Science or MBA(Healthcare)\n• Experience: 2 to 5 years\n• Probation: 3 Months\n• Bond: 1 Year\n\nRoles & Responsibilities:\n• Train new joinees for qualitative and quantitative studies\n• Moderate qualitative and quantitative interviews with professionals across the globe via phone.\n• Adhere to targets shared.\n• Interpret data and formulate reports.\n• Strong written and oral communication skills\n• Responsible for quality check of client deliverables\n• Needs to communicate with their team leader and EM Team on regular basis to discuss the progress on the projects.\n• Needs to establish strong working relationships with internal stakeholders to enhance quality and identify gaps and opportunities for improvement.\n\nSkill set required:\n• Strong written & oral communication skills\n• Ability to interpret data and multitask.\n• Knowledge of Market Research methodologies (secondary & primary)\n• Strong analytical & critical thinking skills\n• Ability to individually manage a small group of people.\n• Eye for detail (sync & logic)","attributesV2":[],"accessibilityTextAttributesV2":[],"accessibilityText":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.6a224ca38654a84754a1eb3e97c0f846"],"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.text.TextViewModel"},"actorNavigationUrl":"https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAACxGbroBOK9TGtNryWsWYpE9gcuhmjbOQGw?miniProfileUrn=urn%3Ali%3Afs_miniProfile%3AACoAACxGbroBOK9TGtNryWsWYpE9gcuhmjbOQGw","addEntityToSearchHistory":false,"image":{"attributes":[{"scalingType":null,"detailData":{"profilePictureWithoutFrame":null,"profilePictureWithRingStatus":null,"companyLogo":null,"icon":null,"systemImage":null,"nonEntityGroupLogo":null,"vectorImage":null,"nonEntityProfessionalEventLogo":null,"profilePicture":null,"imageUrl":null,"professionalEventLogo":null,"nonEntityCompanyLogo":null,"nonEntitySchoolLogo":null,"groupLogo":null,"schoolLogo":null,"ghostImage":null,"nonEntityProfilePicture":{"*profile":"urn:li:fsd_profile:ACoAACxGbroBOK9TGtNryWsWYpE9gcuhmjbOQGw","ringStatus":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.4b009c1d6ea192a94bda77fb9ace3a7d"],"vectorImage":{"digitalmediaAsset":null,"attribution":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.28db8575bcf1c65bdc4bc15948d50ee9"],"artifacts":[{"width":100,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.f0f435b4425ee2990eba8f0a4d614944"],"fileIdentifyingUrlPathSegment":"https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/D4D35AQGCbgo7deWKVw/profile-framedphoto-shrink_100_100/0/1708523464002?e=1709600400&v=beta&t=WV6rirdlCab5mlPRQEcbCEdyLLPapSDFK8yRKu04Kqo","expiresAt":1709600400000,"height":100,"$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorArtifact"}],"rootUrl":"","$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorImage"},"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.image.NonEntityProfilePicture"}},"tintColor":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.eb94fbb1518f790c4545aafdf571c64e"],"tapTargets":[],"displayAspectRatio":null,"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.image.ImageAttribute"}],"editableAccessibilityText":false,"actionTarget":null,"accessibilityTextAttributes":[],"totalCount":null,"accessibilityText":"shruti profile","$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.6a224ca38654a84754a1eb3e97c0f846"],"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.text.TextViewModel"},"overflowActions":[],"*lazyLoadedActions":"urn:li:fsd_lazyLoadedActions:(urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408,CONTENT,SEARCH_SRP)","searchActionType":null,"actorInsights":[],"insightsResolutionResults":[{"jobPostingInsight":null,"*socialActivityCountsInsight":"urn:li:fsd_socialActivityCounts:urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408","relationshipsInsight":null,"serviceProviderRatingInsight":null,"simpleInsight":null,"jobPostingFooterInsight":null,"labelsInsight":null,"premiumCustomCtaInsight":null}],"badgeIcon":null,"entityUrn":"urn:li:fsd_entityResultViewModel:(urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408,SEARCH_SRP,DEFAULT)","showAdditionalCluster":false,"ringStatus":null,"primarySubtitle":{"textDirection":"USER_LOCALE","text":"Machine Learning, Data Science & Data Engineering Recruiter | Organizer of the AI in Action Podcast","attributesV2":[],"accessibilityTextAttributesV2":[],"accessibilityText":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.6a224ca38654a84754a1eb3e97c0f846"],"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.text.TextViewModel"},"badgeText":{"textDirection":"USER_LOCALE","text":"• 1st","attributesV2":[],"accessibilityTextAttributesV2":[],"accessibilityText":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.6a224ca38654a84754a1eb3e97c0f846"],"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.text.TextViewModel"},"trackingId":"jWh6EnhQTxygaY7/DQNM5Q==","summary":{"textDirection":"USER_LOCALE","text":"Check out a few of my priority Machine Learning job openings as we close out February:\n\n⭐ Senior Machine Learning Engineer (RAG/LLM), FinTech, you will build RAG models with vector databases for conversational AI. We are looking for candidates with experience fine-tuning & deploying LLM models. \n- Location: Hybrid in New York, SF, Colorado, or North Carolina. \n\n⭐ AI/ML Researcher (All seniorities), Multi-Strat Fund, you are someone who is looking to apply quantitative methods and ML to steer multi-asset trading strategies. \n- This is an opportunity for someone from a non-traditional finance background to break into the lucrative world of quantitative trading as pure tech AI/ML backgrounds are valued. \n- For candidates in finance, this is a chance to join a buy-side group that leverages machine learning as their north star and it is fundamental to what they do. \n- Location: Hybrid in New York/Connecticut \n\n⭐ Senior or Lead Software Engineer, AI/ML Platform & Infra, FinTech, we are looking for a strong engineer to join a leading NYC-based fintech who closed ~$260M in funding in 2023. \n- We are looking for an engineer who can work end-to-end on the development of a new enterprise LLM product. Responsibilities include core platform/infra work, maximizing throughput while reducing latency, data pipelining/ingesting, MLOPs/DevOps, deploying the latest AI/ML models into production, building the feature store, etc. \n- Location: Hybrid in New York \n\nInterested in any of the above? Message me here or at angelo@alldus.com for more information. \n\nAll candidates must have authorization to work in the U.S. \n\n#Hiring #Machinelearing #artificialintelligence #dataengineering #jobs #mlops #mljobs #fintech #fintechjobs #data 3rd+","attributesV2":[],"accessibilityTextAttributesV2":[],"accessibilityText":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.6a224ca38654a84754a1eb3e97c0f846"],"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.text.TextViewModel"},"trackingId":"ivSlWrSGRCC35OpKvRgj/g==","summary":{"textDirection":"USER_LOCALE","text":"\nHello Folk (Bench sales Recruiter),\nI have one open position\nVery Urgent Role for C2C\nI am hiring please connect and share resume to my email: arti.kumari@diverselynx.com.\n\nTitle: Data Scientist GenAI \nLocation: Remote\njob Type: C2C \n\nResponsibilities:\nBuild and maintain scalable infrastructure for machine learning model & pipeline deployment, including containerization & orchestration.\nDevelop and maintain scalable & secure REST APIs for serving multiple machine learning models to various users.\nCollaborate with data scientists and software engineers to ensure seamless integration of ML models into our systems.\nDesign and optimize data pipelines, data storage, and data processing systems to support the training and inference processes of machine learning models.\nBuild and maintain data and model dashboards to monitor model performance and health in production environments.\nCollaborate with cross-functional teams to identify and address data quality, data governance, and security considerations in the context of ML operations\n#dataanalytics #datascientistjobs #genai #ml #machinelearning ","attributesV2":[],"accessibilityTextAttributesV2":[],"accessibilityText":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.6a224ca38654a84754a1eb3e97c0f846"],"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.text.TextViewModel"},"actorNavigationUrl":"https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAADqRX0wBrJDm0aZFUMGJwRn1DuCJR4OprGg?miniProfileUrn=urn%3Ali%3Afs_miniProfile%3AACoAADqRX0wBrJDm0aZFUMGJwRn1DuCJR4OprGg","addEntityToSearchHistory":false,"image":{"attributes":[{"scalingType":null,"detailData":{"profilePictureWithoutFrame":null,"profilePictureWithRingStatus":null,"companyLogo":null,"icon":null,"systemImage":null,"nonEntityGroupLogo":null,"vectorImage":null,"nonEntityProfessionalEventLogo":null,"profilePicture":null,"imageUrl":null,"professionalEventLogo":null,"nonEntityCompanyLogo":null,"nonEntitySchoolLogo":null,"groupLogo":null,"schoolLogo":null,"ghostImage":null,"nonEntityProfilePicture":{"*profile":"urn:li:fsd_profile:ACoAADqRX0wBrJDm0aZFUMGJwRn1DuCJR4OprGg","ringStatus":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.4b009c1d6ea192a94bda77fb9ace3a7d"],"vectorImage":{"digitalmediaAsset":null,"attribution":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.28db8575bcf1c65bdc4bc15948d50ee9"],"artifacts":[{"width":100,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.f0f435b4425ee2990eba8f0a4d614944"],"fileIdentifyingUrlPathSegment":"https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/D5635AQFLRWkaQzwWeg/profile-framedphoto-shrink_100_100/0/1708984918949?e=1709600400&v=beta&t=ufZjUQRkgHhUL4YGOfcbb8lCZpJgrRaSclORcQNcol0","expiresAt":1709600400000,"height":100,"$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorArtifact"}],"rootUrl":"","$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorImage"},"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.image.NonEntityProfilePicture"}},"tintColor":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.eb94fbb1518f790c4545aafdf571c64e"],"tapTargets":[],"displayAspectRatio":null,"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.image.ImageAttribute"}],"editableAccessibilityText":false,"actionTarget":null,"accessibilityTextAttributes":[],"totalCount":null,"accessibilityText":"Aarti are hiring PhD students in power systems\n\nProfessor Xiaodong Liang's research group at the University of Saskatchewan, Canada, is hiring PhD students in power systems starting in Sept. 2024. Suitable candidates should have a Master's degree in electrical engineering with a focus on power systems. The preference will be given to the candidates with the excellent background in power distribution systems, renewable energy, control, optimization, and machine learning. urgently for Sr. Devops Architect (MLOPS) consultant. Please share profiles at simon.clarks@commfinitytech.com\n\nRole : Sr. Devops Architect (MLOPS) \nLocation : Pittsburgh, PA / Dallas, TX\nC2C will do fine\nExp : 12 yrs and above\n \nJob Summary:\n\nDevOps resource having experience with deployment on AWS services along with OpenShift and other open-source frameworks. This position can be from a non-data science background. We are looking for an individual to build an automated DevOps pipeline to support our Machine Learning organization build and deploy to multiple targets and Develop new strategy for Fraud and AML.\n Executive - GRG Health| MBA in HR & Marketing","attributesV2":[],"accessibilityTextAttributesV2":[],"accessibilityText":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.6a224ca38654a84754a1eb3e97c0f846"],"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.text.TextViewModel"},"badgeText":{"textDirection":"USER_LOCALE","text":"• 3rd+","attributesV2":[],"accessibilityTextAttributesV2":[],"accessibilityText":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.6a224ca38654a84754a1eb3e97c0f846"],"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.text.TextViewModel"},"trackingId":"JAQH5+4RS+af0G/b5I/e4g==","summary":{"textDirection":"USER_LOCALE","text":"We are hiring for Market Research Analyst for Pune Location.\nInterested candidates can share their Cv to sweedal.fernandes@grgonline.com\n\nAbout GRG Health: GRG Health (A Growman Group Company) is an awarded, global healthcare knowledge services and market research company headquartered in Pune (India) with offices in Gurgaon, Bangalore, Boston (USA) and Singapore. GRG Health is working on developing machine learning models that can be implemented in traditional insights gathering and analytics approach. Our dedicated team of data scientists are working with a few clients on pilot run of our AI engine.\n\nExperience: Fresher\nQualifications: • MBA/BTech (Biotech, Microbiology and any life science or healthcare stream) and above graduates (InHealthcare)\n\nRoles & Responsibilities: • You will be responsible for conducting online market/business.\n• Support in research and analysis of market topics.\n• Generate market reports/information database.\n• Create lead across EU and APAC countries and recruit them for interviews via email and phone.\n• Assisting moderate qualitative and quantitative interviews with professionals across the globe via phone.\n• Candidate is expected to conduct in-depth interviews (both face-to-face and telephonic) of target respondents.\n• Candidate is expected to interpret the data and liaise with the team to generate insights and develop reports.\n\nSkill set required: • Strong communication and presentation skills\n• Ability to interpret data and do multitask\n• Knowledge of Market Research • Strong analytical and critical skills\n\nJob type: Full Time (Work from Office)\nLocation: Pune\nProbation – 3 Months\nBond – 1 Year\n\n#pharmacyjobs #biotechjobs #microbiology #pharmaceuticalindustry #punehiring #pharma #lifesciencesjobs #healthcarejobs you agree, that AI, is a game-changer for business agility? Here is what I prepared in my new article.\n\nUnderstanding AI:\n - Rapid data processing, automating business models.\n\nBuilding Flexibility:\n - Integrating AI for quick adaptation.\n - Examples: chatbots, machine learning.\n\nCultivating Agile Mindset:\n - Fostering a culture of experimentation.\n\nLeveraging AI for Customers:\n - Enhancing insights, loyalty through personalization.\n\nData-Driven Decisions:\n - AI tools for informed decisions.\n\nInvesting in AI Skills:\n - Hiring specialists, upskilling for effective implementation.\n\nContinuous Innovation:\n - Core for success in the AI era.\n\nReal-World Examples:\n - Amazon, Walmart showcase AI success.\n\nAI Benefits and Challenges:\n - Efficiency, experiences, competitive advantage.\n - Addressing challenges ethically.\n\nhttps://lnkd.in/eAgkmpx3","attributesV2":[],"accessibilityTextAttributesV2":[],"accessibilityText":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.6a224ca38654a84754a1eb3e97c0f846"],"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.text.TextViewModel"},"actorNavigationUrl":"https://www.linkedin.com/company/colincooper/","addEntityToSearchHistory":false,"image":{"attributes":[{"scalingType":null,"detailData":{"profilePictureWithoutFrame":null,"profilePictureWithRingStatus":null,"companyLogo":null,"icon":null,"systemImage":null,"nonEntityGroupLogo":null,"vectorImage":null,"nonEntityProfessionalEventLogo":null,"profilePicture":null,"imageUrl":null,"professionalEventLogo":null,"nonEntityCompanyLogo":{"*company":"urn:li:fsd_company:68222340","$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.3be27b5a0eb7edd91e98b14c0290096c"],"vectorImage":{"digitalmediaAsset":null,"attribution":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.28db8575bcf1c65bdc4bc15948d50ee9"],"artifacts":[{"width":100,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.f0f435b4425ee2990eba8f0a4d614944"],"fileIdentifyingUrlPathSegment":"https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/D4D0BAQGtsevWSxHu6w/company-logo_100_100/0/1689939590180/colincooper_logo?e=1717027200&v=beta&t=ZcqCFTiApwUOm4VI7UoE7fTfTgNEK4d4nQUZ5bpOUkw","expiresAt":1717027200000,"height":100,"$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorArtifact"}],"rootUrl":"","$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorImage"},"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.image.NonEntityCompanyLogo"},"nonEntitySchoolLogo":null,"groupLogo":null,"schoolLogo":null,"ghostImage":null,"nonEntityProfilePicture":null},"tintColor":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.eb94fbb1518f790c4545aafdf571c64e"],"tapTargets":[],"displayAspectRatio":null,"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.common.image.ImageAttribute"}],"editableAccessibilityText":false,"actionTarget":null,"accessibilityTextAttributes":[],"totalCount":null,"accessibilityText":"Colin .linkedin.voyager.common.TextAttribute"},{"trackingUrn":"urn:li:hashtag:jobs","start":1687,"length":5,"link":"https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=jobs&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7167962246147473408","dashHashtagUrn":"urn:li:fsd_hashtag:(jobs,urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408)","type":"HASHTAG","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.common.TextAttribute"},{"trackingUrn":"urn:li:hashtag:mlops","start":1693,"length":6,"link":"https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=mlops&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7167962246147473408","dashHashtagUrn":"urn:li:fsd_hashtag:(mlops,urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408)","type":"HASHTAG","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.common.TextAttribute"},{"trackingUrn":"urn:li:hashtag:mljobs","start":1700,"length":7,"link":"https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=mljobs&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7167962246147473408","dashHashtagUrn":"urn:li:fsd_hashtag:(mljobs,urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408)","type":"HASHTAG","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.common.TextAttribute"},{"trackingUrn":"urn:li:hashtag:fintech","start":1708,"length":8,"link":"https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=fintech&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7167962246147473408","dashHashtagUrn":"urn:li:fsd_hashtag:(fintech,urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408)","type":"HASHTAG","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.common.TextAttribute"},{"trackingUrn":"urn:li:hashtag:fintechjobs","start":1717,"length":12,"link":"https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=fintechjobs&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7167962246147473408","dashHashtagUrn":"urn:li:fsd_hashtag:(fintechjobs,urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408)","type":"HASHTAG","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.common.TextAttribute"},{"trackingUrn":"urn:li:hashtag:data","start":1730,"length":5,"link":"https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=data&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7167962246147473408","dashHashtagUrn":"urn:li:fsd_hashtag:(data,urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408)","type":"HASHTAG","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.common.TextAttribute"}],"text":"Check out a few of my priority Machine Learning job openings as we close out February:\n\n⭐ Senior Machine Learning Engineer (RAG/LLM), FinTech, you will build RAG models with vector databases for conversational AI. We are looking for candidates with experience fine-tuning & deploying LLM models. \n- Location: Hybrid in New York, SF, Colorado, or North Carolina. \n\n⭐ AI/ML Researcher (All seniorities), Multi-Strat Fund, you are someone who is looking to apply quantitative methods and ML to steer multi-asset trading strategies. \n- This is an opportunity for someone from a non-traditional finance background to break into the lucrative world of quantitative trading as pure tech AI/ML backgrounds are valued. \n- For candidates in finance, this is a chance to join a buy-side group that leverages machine learning as their north star and it is fundamental to what they do. \n- Location: Hybrid in New York/Connecticut \n\n⭐ Senior or Lead Software Engineer, AI/ML Platform & Infra, FinTech, we are looking for a strong engineer to join a leading NYC-based fintech who closed ~$260M in funding in 2023. \n- We are looking for an engineer who can work end-to-end on the development of a new enterprise LLM product. Responsibilities include core platform/infra work, maximizing throughput while reducing latency, data pipelining/ingesting, MLOPs/DevOps, deploying the latest AI/ML models into production, building the feature store, etc. \n- Location: Hybrid in New York \n\nInterested in any of the above? Message me here or at angelo@alldus.com for more information. \n\nAll candidates must have authorization to work in the U.S. \n\n#Hiring #Machinelearing #artificialintelligence #dataengineering #jobs #mlops #mljobs #fintech #fintechjobs #data \n","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.common.TextViewModel"},"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.feed.render.TextComponent"},"additionalContents":null},{"socialDetailEntityUrn":"urn:li:fs_socialDetail:urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408","reactionText":null,"dashEntityUrn":"urn:li:fsd_socialActivityCounts:urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408","reactionByOrganizationActor":null,"numLikes":17,"liked":false,"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.feed.shared.SocialActivityCounts","numViews":null,"urn":"urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408","numComments":1,"reactionTypeCounts":[{"count":15,"reactionType":"LIKE","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.feed.social.ReactionTypeCount"},{"count":1,"reactionType":"APPRECIATION","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.feed.social.ReactionTypeCount"},{"count":1,"reactionType":"EMPATHY","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.feed.social.ReactionTypeCount"}],"likedByOrganizationActor":null,"entityUrn":"urn:li:fs_socialActivityCounts:urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408","numShares":2,"numImpressions":null,"reacted":null},{"dashEntityUrn":"urn:li:fsd_socialPermissions:(urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408,urn:li:fsd_profile:ACoAACKJIMUBc2BHekMuFMNBoNLMSbaHRjuOuEw)","entityUrn":"urn:li:fs_socialPermissions:(urn:li:activity:7167962246147473408,urn:li:fs_profile:(ACoAACKJIMUBc2BHekMuFMNBoNLMSbaHRjuOuEw,en_US))","messagePermission":"PUBLIC","canShare":true,"canReact":true,"canPostComments":true,"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.feed.social.SocialPermissions"},{"customPronoun":null,"lastName":"Amenta","memorialized":null,"dashEntityUrn":"urn:li:fsd_profile:ACoAABBhA84BZaqhSAI5VHa64_NzFS_qgWJ_WIA","standardizedPronoun":null,"occupation":"Machine
